__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
target_property: electron-spin coherence time T₂ for ³¹P donor in ²⁸Si-enriched (≥ 99.99 %) host at sub-100 mK (Kane-scheme single-shot SET readout chemistry)
model_caveat: Universal FFs are atomistic — they predict total energies / forces / stress on the Si lattice + ³¹P substitutional defect site, not the spin-coherence T₂ directly. T₂ is a spin-bath property dominated by residual ²⁹Si nuclear-flip-flop noise + Johnson-Nyquist gate noise. The 30 s value here is a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: lab measurements on ²⁸Si:P donor ensembles. SEMI-QUANTITATIVE: NNP can only frame the host-lattice geometry that gates the residual ²⁹Si fraction; T₂ itself is a measured quantity in the proxy source.
proxy_source: Saeedi et al. 2013 Science 342:830 (³¹P donor in ²⁸Si, electron-spin T₂ ≈ 3 s ensemble at 1.2 K + nuclear-spin T₂ ≈ 39 minutes); Tyryshkin et al. 2012 Nat. Mater. 11:143 (³¹P electron-spin T₂ ≈ 10 s @ 1.8 K in ²⁸Si ensemble); Muhonen et al. 2014 Nat. Nanotechnol. 9:986 (single-donor T₂ ≈ 0.56 s extended to 30 s with Hahn-echo + dynamical-decoupling in ²⁸Si, Morello / Dzurak UNSW)
falsifier_text: electron-spin T₂ < 10 s @ 100 mK OR single-shot readout fidelity < 99 % → FAIL
unproven_markers_preserved: ²⁸Si enrichment cost HARD_WALL — International Avogadro Project + Urenco centrifuge pricing UNVERIFIED at commodity scale
sub-50-ppm ²⁹Si residual UNVERIFIED at 200/300-mm wafer-scale chemical purification
single-shot SET readout fidelity ≥ 99% at scaled-array geometry UNVERIFIED (Muhonen single-donor; multi-donor crosstalk → hexa-chip per CROSS_LINK §3.2)
dual-use export-control friction on centrifuge route SOFT_WALL on commercial supply
honesty_caveats: Ensemble + single-donor T₂ in ²⁸Si:P routinely exceeds 10 s with dynamical decoupling; the 30 s proxy hits at the Muhonen 2014 single-donor benchmark. PASS on T₂ alone does NOT close the candidate — F-QUANTUM-2 has an AND-of-OR falsifier: T₂ < 10 s OR fidelity < 99 % fails. Single-shot readout fidelity at scaled-array geometry is the binding bar (Diraq / SQC roadmap UNVERIFIED at multi-qubit). SPEC_FIRST preserved — does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED. Qubit device integration → hexa-chip per CROSS_LINK §3.2.
license_note: Peer-reviewed paper values per publisher terms; UNSW Morello / Dzurak + Princeton Lyon vendor authority (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
